title: Switched Tools
description: Just a fun texture pack switching every tool's texture with each other.
body:
# Switched Tools
Switched Tools is a resource pack that swaps the textures of all standard tools with one another.
## Features
- Switches tool textures between different tool types
- Axes, swords, pickaxes, shovels, and hoes all appear as different tools
- Does not affect gameplay mechanics
- Lightweight and simple resource pack
## **Why use this pack?**
This pack is made purely for fun and visual confusion. By changing how tools look, it adds an unexpected twist to normal gameplay and can be used to confuse opponents, create challenges, or just mess around with friends.

> To confuse your enemy, you must first confuse yourself ~ Sun Tzu, The Art of War.
